issue_summary: edismax with sow=false fails to create dismax-per-term queries when any field is boosted
javadoc_before: /** Recursively examines the given query list for identical structure in all queries. */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Recursively examines the given query list for identical structure in all queries.
     * Boosts on BoostQuery-s are ignored, and the contained queries are instead used as the basis for comparison.
     **/
